creator: kbyanc@posi.net
text:
Patch to upclient port's Makefile which adds second distribution site
(actually, it is the same site, different protocol). Needed because the
primary distribution site's FTP server has begun rejecting all requests.

	I'm the lyrical PR submitter,
	sending ports to committers.
	But one day I will be free,
	to commit my own ports to the tree.
